failures.description: ProductCatalogSearch timed out while contacting the catalog-service dependency, so no product evidence was available for the agent to answer the price question.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent's goal and plan matched the user request: retrieve the price for item 1096508426 using ProductCatalogSearch with the provided item_id and product_id. The tool invocation at index 3 was well-formed and used the expected arguments. The failure was not due to misunderstanding, invented information, or invalid parameters. The tool returned an explicit timeout error: CatalogServiceTimeoutError, with the message that the catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms. This is an infrastructure/connectivity-style tool failure and was not resolved later in the trajectory.
